title: ReCape
description: Add custom capes to your server
body:
Add any capes to your server - **yes, even in HD format!**

> **Note:** This plugin uses a resource pack.

![ReCape Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VoUHqxm6/images/7ced9ee970804f5fffc63cba8c1435b4514ddcaa.png)

---

## 📦 **Dependencies**
- **PacketEvents:** 2.11.0 or higher  
- **Minecraft:** 1.21.9 – 1.21.11

---

## ⚠️ **Known Issues**
- Iris/OptiFine shaders are **not supported**.
- Cape rotation is **not fully refined**.

---

## 🔐 **Permissions**

| Permission | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| `recape.set` | Access to `/cape set <Cape>` |
| `recape.setother` | Access to `/cape set <Cape> <Username>` |
| `recape.remove` | Access to `/cape remove` |
| `recape.removeother` | Access to `/cape remove <Username>` |
| `recape.repack` | Access to `/recape repack` |
| `recape.reload` | Access to `/recape reload` |

---

## 🚀 **Usage**
1. **Add** cape textures to `ReCape/capes/`
2. **Run** `/recape repack`
3. **Enable** the resource pack (`ReCape/resourcepack.zip`)
